data.title: sprint SKILL.md: Phase 8 Session Close does not invoke /dso:end-session
data.description:
## Expected Behavior
When /dso:sprint completes (Phase 8 Session Close), it should invoke /dso:end-session to perform clean session teardown (technical learnings, bug ticket creation, commit/merge verification, worktree cleanup readiness check, session summary).

## Actual Behavior
Phase 8 in sprint SKILL.md does not invoke /dso:end-session. The orchestrator either stops after epic closure or the user must manually invoke /dso:end. This means technical learnings are not captured, worktree cleanup readiness is not verified, and the session summary is not generated.

## Reproduction
1. Run /dso:sprint on any epic
2. Complete all stories through Phase 7 (epic closure)
3. Observe that no /dso:end-session invocation occurs in Phase 8

## Impact
Session artifacts (learnings, bug tickets from friction) are lost unless the user remembers to manually run /dso:end. Worktree cleanup may fail silently if is_merged + is_clean preconditions are not checked.
